operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO auth_keys (auth_key_id, body, auth_key_type, perm_auth_key_id, temp_auth_key_id, media_temp_auth_key_id) VALUES (:auth_key_id, :body, :auth_key_type, :perm_auth_key_id, :temp_auth_key_id, :media_temp_auth_key_id)

operation.name: SelectByAuthKeyId
operation.sql: SELECT id, auth_key_id, body, auth_key_type, perm_auth_key_id, temp_auth_key_id, media_temp_auth_key_id FROM auth_keys WHERE auth_key_id=:auth_key_id

operation.name: UpdateCustomMap
operation.sql: UPDATE auth_keys SET cMap = :cMap WHERE auth_key_id=:auth_key_id
